detail: Container aegisml: image must include a digest (@sha256:...).
explanation:
Pin container images by digest so deployments are immutable and reproducible. Prefer @sha256:... over mutable tags.

Additional context: Reference your registry policy for approved base images.
recommended_fix_summary: Replace the image reference with repo/image@sha256:<digest> from your approved supply chain.

require_image_digest
